visuals.title: Binary Positional Weight System
visuals.description: Shows how each bit position has a weight that is a power of 2, from LSB (2^0) to MSB

visuals.title: Binary to Decimal Conversion Example
visuals.description: Step-by-step visualization of converting binary 1011 to decimal 11

visuals.title: Data Units: Bit to Byte to Word
visuals.description: Visual representation of bit, nibble, byte, and word relationships

visuals.title: Powers of 2 Growth
visuals.description: Graph showing exponential growth of powers of 2 from 2^0 to 2^10
